_comment: Survivorship policy for the ar_invoice entity type.
With a single source, survivorship is a direct pass-through — there are no
conflicts to resolve.  The default_strategy first_non_null handles any
occasional null within a record set.
output_fields defines the canonical AR invoice schema exposed to BI/analytics.
Only these fields appear in the analytics-layer Parquet for this entity.
match_run_id) are always added by the publisher regardless of this list.
When a second AR source is integrated, add it to source_priority for each
attribute_rule.  The engine handles conflicts at runtime with no code changes.
Source IDs in source_priority must match entity extraction config source_id:

attribute_rules._comment: Primary key — always from Intacct, never null (raise_error in field mapping).
Customer FK — joins to sage-intacct-customer / account_id.
Original invoice total.  Intacct is the system of record.
Amount paid to date.  Most recently updated value is authoritative.
Outstanding balance.  Most recently updated value is authoritative.
Invoice issue date — immutable after creation.
Creation timestamp — earliest represents true creation time.
